import { useState, useEffect } from "react";

const LOGO_IMG = "data:image/png;base64,";
const TEAM_IMG = "data:image/jpeg;base64,";

const COLORS = {
  navy: "#0B1E3E",
  navyLight: "#132844",
  blue: "#1A6BCC",
  blueLight: "#2880E8",
  accent: "#00D4A8",
  accentDark: "#00B890",
  gold: "#F5A623",
  text: "#E8EDF5",
  textMuted: "#8A9BB8",
  surface: "#0F2040",
  surfaceLight: "#162B50",
  border: "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
};

const FONTS = `@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap');`;

function Nav({ page, setPage }) {
  const [scrolled, setScrolled] = useState(false);
  useEffect(() => {
    const h = () => setScrolled(window.scrollY > 20);
    window.addEventListener("scroll", h);
    return () => window.removeEventListener("scroll", h);
  }, []);
  const links = ["Home","Practice Tests","Score Calculator","Analytics","Pricing"];
  return (
    <nav style={{
      position:"fixed",top:0,left:0,right:0,zIndex:100,
      background: scrolled ? "rgba(11,30,62,0.97)" : "transparent",
      backdropFilter: scrolled ? "blur(12px)" : "none",
      borderBottom: scrolled ? `1px solid ${COLORS.border}` : "none",
      transition:"all 0.3s ease",padding:"0 2rem",
      display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"space-between",height:68,
    }}>
      <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10,cursor:"pointer"}} onClick={()=>setPage("home")}>
        <img src={LOGO_IMG} alt="SAT PrepPros Logo" style={{width:44,height:44,objectFit:"contain",borderRadius:6}} />
        <span style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:800,color:COLORS.text,fontSize:18}}>
          SAT <span style={{color:COLORS.accent}}>PrepPros</span>
        </span>
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:4}}>
        {links.map(l=>(
          <button key={l} onClick={()=>setPage(l.toLowerCase().replace(/ /g,"-"))} style={{
            background:"none",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",
            color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",
            fontSize:14,fontWeight:500,padding:"8px 14px",borderRadius:8,transition:"color 0.2s",
          }}
            onMouseEnter={e=>e.target.style.color=COLORS.text}
            onMouseLeave={e=>e.target.style.color=COLORS.textMuted}
          >{l}</button>
        ))}
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10}}>
        <button onClick={()=>setPage("signin")} style={{
          background:"none",border:`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,
          color:COLORS.text,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",
          fontSize:14,fontWeight:500,padding:"8px 20px",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",
          transition:"border-color 0.2s",
        }}
          onMouseEnter={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=COLORS.accent}
          onMouseLeave={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=COLORS.border}
        >Sign In</button>
        <button onClick={()=>setPage("signup")} style={{
          background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${COLORS.blue},${COLORS.accent})`,
          border:"none",color:"#fff",
          fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:14,fontWeight:600,
          padding:"8px 20px",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",
          boxShadow:`0 0 20px rgba(0,212,168,0.25)`,
        }}>Start Free</button>
      </div>
    </nav>
  );
}

function HomePage({ setPage }) {
  const features = [
    {icon:"🧠",title:"AI Study Plans",desc:"Personalized plans that adapt to your strengths and weaknesses in real time."},
    {icon:"📝",title:"Full-Length Tests",desc:"All Bluebook practice tests replicated exactly — Module 1 → adaptive Module 2."},
    {icon:"📊",title:"Score Analytics",desc:"Deep breakdown by domain, difficulty, and module. Know exactly where to improve."},
    {icon:"⚡",title:"Instant Score Calc",desc:"Convert raw to scaled scores instantly. See your 400–1600 estimate in seconds."},
    {icon:"🎯",title:"Question Bank",desc:"Full SQB from College Board — every Reading, Writing, and Math question with explanations."},
    {icon:"🔄",title:"Adaptive Logic",desc:"Real exam simulation: Module 2 difficulty adjusts based on your Module 1 score."},
  ];
  const stats = [
    {n:"98",label:"Questions per test"},
    {n:"400–1600",label:"Score range"},
    {n:"2h 14m",label:"Full test duration"},
    {n:"Free",label:"To start today"},
  ];

  return (
    <div>
      <section style={{
        minHeight:"100vh",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",
        flexDirection:"column",textAlign:"center",padding:"120px 2rem 80px",
        position:"relative",overflow:"hidden",
      }}>
        <div style={{position:"absolute",top:"15%",left:"10%",width:400,height:400,borderRadius:"50%",
          background:"radial-gradient(circle, rgba(26,107,204,0.15) 0%, transparent 70%)",pointerEvents:"none"}} />
        <div style={{position:"absolute",bottom:"10%",right:"10%",width:350,height:350,borderRadius:"50%",
          background:"radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0,212,168,0.12) 0%, transparent 70%)",pointerEvents:"none"}} />

        <div style={{display:"inline-flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8,
          background:"rgba(0,212,168,0.1)",border:`1px solid rgba(0,212,168,0.3)`,
          borderRadius:100,padding:"6px 16px",marginBottom:28}}>
          <span style={{width:6,height:6,borderRadius:"50%",background:COLORS.accent,display:"inline-block"}} />
          <span style={{color:COLORS.accent,fontSize:13,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontWeight:500}}>
            AI-Powered · Free to Start · Bluebook Accurate
          </span>
        </div>

        <h1 style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:800,fontSize:"clamp(2.8rem, 6vw, 5rem)",
          lineHeight:1.1,color:COLORS.text,maxWidth:800,margin:"0 auto 24px"}}>
          Master the Digital SAT<br/>
          <span style={{background:`linear-gradient(90deg,${COLORS.blue},${COLORS.accent})`,
            WebkitBackgroundClip:"text",WebkitTextFillColor:"transparent"}}>
            with AI Precision
          </span>
        </h1>
        <p style={{fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontWeight:300,fontSize:"1.15rem",
          color:COLORS.textMuted,maxWidth:600,margin:"0 auto 40px",lineHeight:1.7}}>
          Full-length Bluebook practice tests, adaptive modules, AI study plans, and instant score analysis — everything you need to hit your target score.
        </p>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:14,flexWrap:"wrap",justifyContent:"center"}}>
          <button onClick={()=>setPage("signup")} style={{
            background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${COLORS.blue},${COLORS.accent})`,
            border:"none",color:"#fff",fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontWeight:600,fontSize:16,
            padding:"14px 32px",borderRadius:12,cursor:"pointer",
            boxShadow:`0 8px 30px rgba(0,212,168,0.3)`,transition:"transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s",
          }}
            onMouseEnter={e=>{e.target.style.transform="translateY(-2px)";e.target.style.boxShadow=`0 12px 40px rgba(0,212,168,0.4)`;}}
            onMouseLeave={e=>{e.target.style.transform="translateY(0)";e.target.style.boxShadow=`0 8px 30px rgba(0,212,168,0.3)`;}}
          >Start Preparing — Free</button>
          <button onClick={()=>setPage("practice-tests")} style={{
            background:"none",border:`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,color:COLORS.text,
            fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:16,fontWeight:500,
            padding:"14px 32px",borderRadius:12,cursor:"pointer",transition:"border-color 0.2s",
          }}
            onMouseEnter={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=COLORS.blue}
            onMouseLeave={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=COLORS.border}
          >View Practice Tests</button>
        </div>

        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:0,marginTop:72,flexWrap:"wrap",justifyContent:"center",
          background:COLORS.surface,borderRadius:16,border:`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,overflow:"hidden"}}>
          {stats.map((s,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{padding:"24px 40px",textAlign:"center",
              borderRight:i<stats.length-1?`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`:"none"}}>
              <div style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:700,fontSize:"1.8rem",color:COLORS.text}}>{s.n}</div>
              <div style={{fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:13,color:COLORS.textMuted,marginTop:4}}>{s.label}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* FOUNDERS / TEAM SECTION */}
      <section style={{padding:"0 2rem 80px",maxWidth:1100,margin:"0 auto"}}>
        <div style={{position:"relative",borderRadius:24,overflow:"hidden",
          border:`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,boxShadow:"0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)"}}>
          <img src={TEAM_IMG} alt="SAT PrepPros founders - Hayotbek Baxodirov & Sanjarbek Mamasodiqov" 
            style={{width:"100%",display:"block",objectFit:"cover",maxHeight:480}} />
          <div style={{position:"absolute",bottom:0,left:0,right:0,
            background:"linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(11,30,62,0.95))",
            padding:"60px 32px 28px",display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"flex-end"}}>
            <div>
              <div style={{color:COLORS.accent,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:13,fontWeight:600,marginBottom:6}}>
                Co-Founders
              </div>
              <div style={{color:COLORS.text,fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:700,fontSize:"1.4rem"}}>
                Behind SAT PrepPros
              </div>
            </div>
            <a href="https://t.me/satpreppros" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style={{
              display:"inline-flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8,
              background:"rgba(0,212,168,0.15)",border:`1px solid rgba(0,212,168,0.4)`,
              color:COLORS.accent,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:14,fontWeight:600,
              padding:"10px 20px",borderRadius:100,textDecoration:"none",
            }}>
              📱 @satpreppros on Telegram
            </a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Features */}
      <section style={{padding:"20px 2rem 80px",maxWidth:1100,margin:"0 auto"}}>
        <div style={{textAlign:"center",marginBottom:60}}>
          <h2 style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:700,fontSize:"2.2rem",color:COLORS.text,margin:"0 0 16px"}}>
            Everything you need to score higher
          </h2>
          <p style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:"1rem"}}>
            Built around the real Digital SAT structure. No fluff, no guessing.
          </p>
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr))",gap:20}}>
          {features.map((f,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{
              background:COLORS.surface,border:`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,
              borderRadius:16,padding:"28px",
              transition:"border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s",cursor:"default",
            }}
              onMouseEnter={e=>{e.currentTarget.style.borderColor=`rgba(0,212,168,0.3)`;e.currentTarget.style.transform="translateY(-3px)";}}
              onMouseLeave={e=>{e.currentTarget.style.borderColor=COLORS.border;e.currentTarget.style.transform="translateY(0)";}}
            >
              <div style={{fontSize:32,marginBottom:16}}>{f.icon}</div>
              <div style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:600,fontSize:"1.05rem",color:COLORS.text,marginBottom:10}}>{f.title}</div>
              <div style={{fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:14,color:COLORS.textMuted,lineHeight:1.6}}>{f.desc}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Telegram CTA */}
      <section style={{padding:"0 2rem 80px",maxWidth:1100,margin:"0 auto"}}>
        <div style={{
          background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${COLORS.navyLight},${COLORS.surfaceLight})`,
          border:`1px solid rgba(0,212,168,0.2)`,borderRadius:24,padding:"48px",
          display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"space-between",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:24,
        }}>
          <div>
            <div style={{color:COLORS.accent,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontWeight:600,fontSize:13,marginBottom:8}}>
              📱 FREE QUESTIONS ON TELEGRAM
            </div>
            <h3 style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:700,fontSize:"1.6rem",color:COLORS.text,margin:"0 0 12px"}}>
              Daily Practice Questions & Explanations
            </h3>
            <p style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:14,margin:0,maxWidth:480}}>
              Join @SATprepPros on Telegram for daily DSAT practice questions with full explanations — completely free. Real exam questions, expert breakdowns.
            </p>
          </div>
          <a href="https://t.me/satpreppros" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style={{
            background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${COLORS.blue},${COLORS.accent})`,
            border:"none",color:"#fff",fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontWeight:600,fontSize:15,
            padding:"14px 28px",borderRadius:12,cursor:"pointer",textDecoration:"none",
            display:"inline-block",whiteSpace:"nowrap",
          }}>Join on Telegram →</a>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* CTA */}
      <section style={{padding:"0 2rem 100px",maxWidth:900,margin:"0 auto"}}>
        <div style={{
          background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${COLORS.navyLight},${COLORS.surfaceLight})`,
          border:`1px solid rgba(0,212,168,0.2)`,borderRadius:24,padding:"60px 48px",textAlign:"center",
          position:"relative",overflow:"hidden",
        }}>
          <div style={{position:"absolute",top:-60,right:-60,width:300,height:300,borderRadius:"50%",
            background:"radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0,212,168,0.1) 0%, transparent 70%)"}} />
          <h2 style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:700,fontSize:"2rem",color:COLORS.text,margin:"0 0 16px"}}>
            Start your SAT journey today
          </h2>
          <p style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",marginBottom:32}}>
            Join thousands of students preparing smarter with AI-driven study plans.
          </p>
          <button onClick={()=>setPage("signup")} style={{
            background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${COLORS.blue},${COLORS.accent})`,
            border:"none",color:"#fff",fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontWeight:600,fontSize:16,
            padding:"14px 36px",borderRadius:12,cursor:"pointer",
          }}>Create Free Account</button>
        </div>
      </section>
    </div>
  );
}

function PracticeTestsPage({ setPage }) {
  const tests = [
    {num:1,title:"Practice Test 1",questions:98,duration:"2h 14m",difficulty:"Standard",status:"available"},
    {num:2,title:"Practice Test 2",questions:98,duration:"2h 14m",difficulty:"Standard",status:"available"},
    {num:3,title:"Practice Test 3",questions:98,duration:"2h 14m",difficulty:"Medium",status:"available"},
    {num:4,title:"Practice Test 4",questions:98,duration:"2h 14m",difficulty:"Medium",status:"available"},
    {num:5,title:"Practice Test 5",questions:98,duration:"2h 14m",difficulty:"Hard",status:"signin"},
    {num:6,title:"Practice Test 6",questions:98,duration:"2h 14m",difficulty:"Hard",status:"signin"},
  ];
  const diffColor={Standard:COLORS.accent,Medium:COLORS.gold,Hard:"#FF6B6B"};

  return (
    <div style={{padding:"120px 2rem 80px",maxWidth:1000,margin:"0 auto"}}>
      <h1 style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:800,fontSize:"2.5rem",color:COLORS.text,marginBottom:12}}>
        Full-Length Practice Tests
      </h1>
      <p style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",marginBottom:48}}>
        Exact replicas of Bluebook tests — Module 1 → adaptive Module 2. Reading & Writing + Math.
      </p>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr))",gap:18}}>
        {tests.map(t=>(
          <div key={t.num} style={{
            background:COLORS.surface,border:`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,
            borderRadius:16,padding:"28px",transition:"border-color 0.2s",
          }}
            onMouseEnter={e=>e.currentTarget.style.borderColor=COLORS.blue}
            onMouseLeave={e=>e.currentTarget.style.borderColor=COLORS.border}
          >
            <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"flex-start",marginBottom:20}}>
              <div style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:800,fontSize:"2.5rem",
                color:`rgba(26,107,204,0.3)`,lineHeight:1}}>0{t.num}</div>
              <span style={{
                background:`${diffColor[t.difficulty]}22`,color:diffColor[t.difficulty],
                fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,
                padding:"4px 12px",borderRadius:100,border:`1px solid ${diffColor[t.difficulty]}44`,
              }}>{t.difficulty}</span>
            </div>
            <div style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:600,fontSize:"1.1rem",color:COLORS.text,marginBottom:8}}>{t.title}</div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:20,marginBottom:24}}>
              <span style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:13}}>📝 {t.questions} questions</span>
              <span style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:13}}>⏱ {t.duration}</span>
            </div>
            <button onClick={()=>t.status==="signin"?setPage("signin"):setPage("test-"+t.num)} style={{
              width:"100%",
              background:t.status==="signin"?"none":`linear-gradient(135deg,${COLORS.blue},${COLORS.accent})`,
              border:t.status==="signin"?`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`:"none",
              color:COLORS.text,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontWeight:600,fontSize:14,
              padding:"10px",borderRadius:10,cursor:"pointer",
            }}>{t.status==="signin"?"🔒 Sign In to Access":"Start Test →"}</button>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
      <div style={{marginTop:48,background:COLORS.surface,border:`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,borderRadius:16,padding:28}}>
        <h3 style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:600,color:COLORS.text,marginBottom:16}}>Test Structure</h3>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:12}}>
          {[
            {section:"Reading & Writing",modules:"2 modules × 27 questions",time:"32 min each"},
            {section:"Math",modules:"2 modules × 22 questions",time:"35 min each"},
          ].map((s,i)=>(
            <div key={i} style={{background:COLORS.navyLight,borderRadius:12,padding:"20px 24px"}}>
              <div style={{color:COLORS.accent,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:13,fontWeight:600,marginBottom:6}}>{s.section}</div>
              <div style={{color:COLORS.text,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:14}}>{s.modules}</div>
              <div style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:13,marginTop:4}}>{s.time}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Telegram Q bank promo */}
      <div style={{marginTop:28,background:`linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,212,168,0.08),rgba(26,107,204,0.08))`,
        border:`1px solid rgba(0,212,168,0.25)`,borderRadius:16,padding:"24px 28px",
        display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"space-between",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:16}}>
        <div>
          <div style={{color:COLORS.accent,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:13,fontWeight:600,marginBottom:4}}>
            📱 FREE DAILY QUESTIONS
          </div>
          <div style={{color:COLORS.text,fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:600,fontSize:"1rem"}}>
            Get practice questions + explanations on Telegram @SATprepPros
          </div>
        </div>
        <a href="https://t.me/satpreppros" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style={{
          background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${COLORS.blue},${COLORS.accent})`,
          color:"#fff",fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontWeight:600,fontSize:14,
          padding:"10px 22px",borderRadius:10,textDecoration:"none",whiteSpace:"nowrap",
        }}>Open Telegram →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function ScoreCalculatorPage() {
  const [rwRaw, setRwRaw] = useState(40);
  const [mathRaw, setMathRaw] = useState(33);

  const rawToScaled = (raw, max) => {
    const pct = raw / max;
    const raw_scaled = 200 + pct * 600;
    return Math.round(raw_scaled / 10) * 10;
  };

  const rwScaled = rawToScaled(rwRaw, 54);
  const mathScaled = rawToScaled(mathRaw, 44);
  const total = rwScaled + mathScaled;
  const percentile = Math.round(50 + ((total - 1000) / 600) * 48);
  const clampedPct = Math.max(1, Math.min(99, percentile));
  const scoreColor = total >= 1400 ? COLORS.accent : total >= 1200 ? COLORS.gold : total >= 1000 ? COLORS.blue : "#FF6B6B";

  return (
    <div style={{padding:"120px 2rem 80px",maxWidth:820,margin:"0 auto"}}>
      <h1 style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:800,fontSize:"2.5rem",color:COLORS.text,marginBottom:12}}>
        Score Calculator
      </h1>
      <p style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",marginBottom:48}}>
        Enter your raw scores and get an instant estimated scaled score — just like the real Digital SAT. Scores are multiples of 10 (200–800 per section).
      </p>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:20,marginBottom:32}}>
        {[
          {label:"Reading & Writing",raw:rwRaw,setRaw:setRwRaw,max:54,scaled:rwScaled},
          {label:"Math",raw:mathRaw,setRaw:setMathRaw,max:44,scaled:mathScaled},
        ].map((s,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{background:COLORS.surface,border:`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,borderRadius:16,padding:28}}>
            <div style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:600,color:COLORS.text,marginBottom:20}}>{s.label}</div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",marginBottom:12}}>
              <span style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontSize:13,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif"}}>Raw score: {s.raw} / {s.max}</span>
            </div>
            <input type="range" min={0} max={s.max} step={1} value={s.raw}
              onChange={e=>s.setRaw(Number(e.target.value))}
              style={{width:"100%",accentColor:COLORS.accent,marginBottom:20,height:4}} />
            <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"baseline",gap:8}}>
              <span style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:800,fontSize:"2.8rem",color:COLORS.text}}>{s.scaled}</span>
              <span style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontSize:14,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif"}}>/ 800</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
      <div style={{
        background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${COLORS.navyLight},${COLORS.surfaceLight})`,
        border:`2px solid ${scoreColor}44`,borderRadius:20,padding:"40px 48px",
        display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"space-between",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:24,
      }}>
        <div>
          <div style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:14,marginBottom:8}}>Estimated Total Score</div>
          <div style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:800,fontSize:"4rem",color:scoreColor,lineHeight:1}}>{total}</div>
          <div style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:14,marginTop:8}}>out of 1600</div>
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:16,minWidth:200}}>
          <div style={{background:COLORS.surface,borderRadius:12,padding:"16px 20px"}}>
            <div style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",marginBottom:4}}>Approx. Percentile</div>
            <div style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:700,fontSize:"1.5rem",color:COLORS.text}}>{clampedPct}th</div>
          </div>
          <div style={{background:COLORS.surface,borderRadius:12,padding:"16px 20px"}}>
            <div style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",marginBottom:4}}>Score Category</div>
            <div style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:700,fontSize:"1rem",color:scoreColor}}>
              {total>=1400?"🏆 Excellent":total>=1200?"⭐ Strong":total>=1000?"📈 Good":"💪 Keep Improving"}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style={{marginTop:20,background:COLORS.surface,border:`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,borderRadius:12,padding:"16px 24px"}}>
        <p style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontSize:13,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",margin:0}}>
          ⚠️ Estimated score based on a conversion model. All section scores are multiples of 10 (200–800). Actual scores depend on adaptive Module 2 difficulty and test form.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function AnalyticsPage({ setPage }) {
  const domains = [
    {name:"Information & Ideas",score:78,color:COLORS.accent},
    {name:"Craft & Structure",score:62,color:COLORS.blue},
    {name:"Expression of Ideas",score:71,color:COLORS.gold},
    {name:"Standard English Conventions",score:85,color:"#A78BFA"},
    {name:"Algebra",score:55,color:COLORS.accent},
    {name:"Advanced Math",score:48,color:COLORS.blue},
    {name:"Problem Solving & Data Analysis",score:66,color:COLORS.gold},
    {name:"Geometry & Trigonometry",score:43,color:"#FF6B6B"},
  ];
  return (
    <div style={{padding:"120px 2rem 80px",maxWidth:1000,margin:"0 auto"}}>
      <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",alignItems:"flex-start",marginBottom:48,flexWrap:"wrap",gap:16}}>
        <div>
          <h1 style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:800,fontSize:"2.5rem",color:COLORS.text,marginBottom:12}}>
            Performance Analytics
          </h1>
          <p style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif"}}>
            Detailed breakdown by domain and difficulty — sign in to see your data.
          </p>
        </div>
        <button onClick={()=>setPage("signin")} style={{
          background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${COLORS.blue},${COLORS.accent})`,
          border:"none",color:"#fff",fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontWeight:600,fontSize:14,
          padding:"12px 24px",borderRadius:10,cursor:"pointer",
        }}>Sign In to View Your Stats</button>
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(4, 1fr)",gap:14,marginBottom:28}}>
        {[
          {label:"Tests Taken",val:"4",icon:"📋"},
          {label:"Avg Score",val:"1280",icon:"📊"},
          {label:"Improvement",val:"+120",icon:"📈"},
          {label:"Accuracy",val:"74%",icon:"🎯"},
        ].map((s,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{background:COLORS.surface,border:`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,borderRadius:14,padding:"20px 18px"}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:22,marginBottom:8}}>{s.icon}</div>
            <div style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:700,fontSize:"1.6rem",color:COLORS.text}}>{s.val}</div>
            <div style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontSize:12,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",marginTop:4}}>{s.label}</div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
      <div style={{background:COLORS.surface,border:`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,borderRadius:16,padding:28}}>
        <div style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:600,color:COLORS.text,marginBottom:24}}>Domain Performance</div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:14}}>
          {domains.map((d,i)=>(
            <div key={i}>
              <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",marginBottom:6}}>
                <span style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontSize:13,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif"}}>{d.name}</span>
                <span style={{color:COLORS.text,fontSize:13,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontWeight:500}}>{d.score}%</span>
              </div>
              <div style={{height:6,background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.06)",borderRadius:100}}>
                <div style={{height:"100%",borderRadius:100,background:d.color,width:`${d.score}%`,transition:"width 0.8s ease"}} />
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function PricingPage({ setPage }) {
  const plans = [
    {
      name:"Free",price:"$0",period:"forever",
      features:["2 full-length practice tests","Basic score calculator","Module performance summary","Limited question bank access"],
      cta:"Start Free",primary:false,
    },
    {
      name:"Pro",price:"$19",period:"/month",
      features:["All 6+ full-length practice tests","Full SQB question bank","AI-generated study plans","Detailed domain analytics","Adaptive difficulty simulation","Unlimited practice questions","Explanations for every question"],
      cta:"Get Pro",primary:true,badge:"Most Popular",
    },
    {
      name:"Team",price:"$49",period:"/month",
      features:["Everything in Pro","Up to 5 students","Instructor dashboard","Progress reports","Priority support"],
      cta:"Contact Us",primary:false,
    },
  ];
  return (
    <div style={{padding:"120px 2rem 80px",maxWidth:1000,margin:"0 auto"}}>
      <div style={{textAlign:"center",marginBottom:60}}>
        <h1 style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:800,fontSize:"2.5rem",color:COLORS.text,marginBottom:12}}>
          Simple Pricing
        </h1>
        <p style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif"}}>Start free, upgrade when you need more.</p>
      </div>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(3, 1fr)",gap:20}}>
        {plans.map((p,i)=>(
          <div key={i} style={{
            background:p.primary?`linear-gradient(160deg,${COLORS.navyLight},${COLORS.surfaceLight})`:COLORS.surface,
            border:p.primary?`2px solid ${COLORS.accent}44`:`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,
            borderRadius:20,padding:"32px 28px",position:"relative",
          }}>
            {p.badge&&(
              <div style={{position:"absolute",top:-12,left:"50%",transform:"translateX(-50%)",
                background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${COLORS.blue},${COLORS.accent})`,
                color:"#fff",fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontWeight:600,
                fontSize:12,padding:"4px 16px",borderRadius:100,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>{p.badge}</div>
            )}
            <div style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:700,color:COLORS.text,fontSize:"1.1rem",marginBottom:16}}>{p.name}</div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"baseline",gap:4,marginBottom:28}}>
              <span style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:800,fontSize:"2.8rem",color:p.primary?COLORS.accent:COLORS.text}}>{p.price}</span>
              <span style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:14}}>{p.period}</span>
            </div>
            <ul style={{listStyle:"none",padding:0,margin:"0 0 28px",display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:10}}>
              {p.features.map((f,j)=>(
                <li key={j} style={{display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
                  <span style={{color:COLORS.accent,fontSize:14,marginTop:2}}>✓</span>
                  <span style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:14,lineHeight:1.4}}>{f}</span>
                </li>
              ))}
            </ul>
            <button onClick={()=>setPage("signup")} style={{
              width:"100%",
              background:p.primary?`linear-gradient(135deg,${COLORS.blue},${COLORS.accent})`:"none",
              border:p.primary?"none":`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,
              color:COLORS.text,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontWeight:600,fontSize:14,
              padding:"12px",borderRadius:10,cursor:"pointer",
            }}>{p.cta}</button>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function TelegramQuestionsPage() {
  const questions = [
    {
      id:1,subject:"Math",topic:"Algebra",difficulty:"Medium",
      question:"If 3x + 7 = 22, what is the value of 6x + 5?",
      options:["A) 25","B) 30","C) 35","D) 40"],
      answer:"C) 35",
      explanation:"First solve for x: 3x + 7 = 22 → 3x = 15 → x = 5. Then substitute: 6(5) + 5 = 30 + 5 = 35. Notice you could also multiply the original equation by 2 to get 6x + 14 = 44, then 6x = 30, so 6x + 5 = 35.",
    },
    {
      id:2,subject:"Reading & Writing",topic:"Information & Ideas",difficulty:"Hard",
      question:"A researcher studying coral reefs found that bleaching events increased by 400% over 40 years. Which statement, if true, would most directly support the conclusion that rising ocean temperatures caused this increase?",
      options:[
        "A) Bleaching events occurred more often in El Niño years when ocean temperatures spiked",
        "B) Coral reefs are found in tropical regions with naturally warm waters",
        "C) Scientists have studied coral reefs since the 1970s",
        "D) Bleached corals can recover if conditions improve quickly",
      ],
      answer:"A) Bleaching events occurred more often in El Niño years when ocean temperatures spiked",
      explanation:"The question asks for evidence that temperature causes bleaching. Option A directly shows a correlation between temperature spikes (El Niño) and more bleaching — this is the strongest causal link. B describes baseline conditions, not change. C is about research history. D is about recovery, not causation.",
    },
    {
      id:3,subject:"Math",topic:"Advanced Math",difficulty:"Hard",
      question:"The function f(x) = x² - 6x + k has its minimum value at x = 3. What value of k makes the minimum value of f(x) equal to -4?",
      options:["A) k = 5","B) k = -4","C) k = 9","D) k = 13"],
      answer:"A) k = 5",
      explanation:"Complete the square: f(x) = (x-3)² - 9 + k. The minimum occurs at x = 3 and equals -9 + k. Set -9 + k = -4, so k = 5. Check: f(3) = 9 - 18 + 5 = -4 ✓",
    },
    {
      id:4,subject:"Reading & Writing",topic:"Standard English Conventions",difficulty:"Easy",
      question:"Select the best version of the underlined portion: \"The data _____ clear: students who sleep 8 hours perform significantly better.\"",
      options:[
        "A) are",
        "B) is",
        "C) were",
        "D) has been",
      ],
      answer:"A) are",
      explanation:"\"Data\" is a plural noun (singular: datum). In formal academic and scientific writing — which the DSAT follows — \"data are\" is correct. The sentence describes a current, ongoing fact, so present tense is appropriate.",
    },
    {
      id:5,subject:"Math",topic:"Problem Solving & Data Analysis",difficulty:"Medium",
      question:"In a survey of 200 students, 45% said they study with music. Of those who study with music, 60% reported higher focus. Approximately how many students in the survey both study with music AND report higher focus?",
      options:["A) 54","B) 60","C) 90","D) 120"],
      answer:"A) 54",
      explanation:"Students who study with music: 45% × 200 = 90. Of those 90, who report higher focus: 60% × 90 = 54. Answer: 54 students.",
    },
  ];

  const [revealed, setRevealed] = useState({});
  const toggle = (id) => setRevealed(prev=>({...prev,[id]:!prev[id]}));
  const diffColor={Easy:COLORS.accent,Medium:COLORS.gold,Hard:"#FF6B6B"};
  const subjectColor={"Math":COLORS.blue,"Reading & Writing":"#A78BFA"};

  return (
    <div style={{padding:"120px 2rem 80px",maxWidth:860,margin:"0 auto"}}>
      <div style={{marginBottom:12,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:12}}>
        <img src={LOGO_IMG} alt="logo" style={{width:36,height:36,objectFit:"contain"}} />
        <h1 style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:800,fontSize:"2.5rem",color:COLORS.text,margin:0}}>
          Practice Questions
        </h1>
      </div>
      <p style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",marginBottom:12}}>
        Sample questions from <strong style={{color:COLORS.accent}}>@SATprepPros</strong> on Telegram — with full explanations. Join for daily questions!
      </p>
      <a href="https://t.me/satpreppros" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style={{
        display:"inline-flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8,
        background:"rgba(0,212,168,0.1)",border:`1px solid rgba(0,212,168,0.35)`,
        color:COLORS.accent,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:13,fontWeight:600,
        padding:"8px 18px",borderRadius:100,textDecoration:"none",marginBottom:48,
      }}>📱 Join @SATprepPros on Telegram for daily questions →</a>

      <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:24}}>
        {questions.map((q,i)=>(
          <div key={q.id} style={{
            background:COLORS.surface,border:`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,
            borderRadius:16,padding:"28px 32px",
          }}>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:10,marginBottom:16,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
              <span style={{
                background:`${subjectColor[q.subject]}22`,color:subjectColor[q.subject],
                fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,
                padding:"4px 12px",borderRadius:100,border:`1px solid ${subjectColor[q.subject]}44`,
              }}>{q.subject}</span>
              <span style={{
                background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.05)",color:COLORS.textMuted,
                fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:12,fontWeight:500,
                padding:"4px 12px",borderRadius:100,
              }}>{q.topic}</span>
              <span style={{
                background:`${diffColor[q.difficulty]}15`,color:diffColor[q.difficulty],
                fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:12,fontWeight:600,
                padding:"4px 12px",borderRadius:100,border:`1px solid ${diffColor[q.difficulty]}33`,
              }}>{q.difficulty}</span>
            </div>

            <div style={{fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:"1rem",color:COLORS.text,
              lineHeight:1.65,marginBottom:20,fontWeight:400}}>{q.question}</div>

            <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:8,marginBottom:20}}>
              {q.options.map((opt,j)=>(
                <div key={j} style={{
                  background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.03)",border:`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,
                  borderRadius:10,padding:"10px 16px",
                  fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:14,color:COLORS.textMuted,
                  lineHeight:1.4,
                  ...(revealed[q.id]&&opt===q.answer?{
                    border:`1px solid ${COLORS.accent}66`,
                    background:`rgba(0,212,168,0.08)`,color:COLORS.text,
                  }:{})
                }}>{opt}</div>
              ))}
            </div>

            <button onClick={()=>toggle(q.id)} style={{
              background:revealed[q.id]?"none":`linear-gradient(135deg,${COLORS.blue},${COLORS.accent})`,
              border:revealed[q.id]?`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`:"none",
              color:COLORS.text,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontWeight:600,fontSize:13,
              padding:"10px 20px",borderRadius:10,cursor:"pointer",marginBottom: revealed[q.id]?16:0,
            }}>{revealed[q.id]?"Hide Explanation":"Show Answer & Explanation"}</button>

            {revealed[q.id]&&(
              <div style={{
                background:"rgba(0,212,168,0.06)",border:`1px solid rgba(0,212,168,0.2)`,
                borderRadius:12,padding:"18px 20px",
              }}>
                <div style={{color:COLORS.accent,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,marginBottom:6}}>
                  ✅ ANSWER: {q.answer}
                </div>
                <div style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:14,lineHeight:1.65}}>
                  <strong style={{color:COLORS.text}}>Explanation: </strong>{q.explanation}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      <div style={{marginTop:40,textAlign:"center",
        background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${COLORS.navyLight},${COLORS.surfaceLight})`,
        border:`1px solid rgba(0,212,168,0.2)`,borderRadius:20,padding:"40px 32px"}}>
        <div style={{fontSize:32,marginBottom:12}}>📱</div>
        <h3 style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:700,fontSize:"1.4rem",color:COLORS.text,margin:"0 0 10px"}}>
          Get Daily Questions on Telegram
        </h3>
        <p style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:14,marginBottom:24}}>
          New DSAT practice questions + full expert explanations every day — completely free.
        </p>
        <a href="https://t.me/satpreppros" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style={{
          background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${COLORS.blue},${COLORS.accent})`,
          color:"#fff",fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontWeight:600,fontSize:15,
          padding:"13px 30px",borderRadius:12,textDecoration:"none",display:"inline-block",
        }}>Join @SATprepPros →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function AuthPage({ mode, setPage }) {
  const isSignup = mode === "signup";
  const inputStyle = {
    width:"100%",boxSizing:"border-box",
    background:COLORS.surface,border:`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,
    borderRadius:10,padding:"12px 16px",color:COLORS.text,
    fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:14,outline:"none",transition:"border-color 0.2s",
  };
  return (
    <div style={{minHeight:"100vh",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",padding:"2rem"}}>
      <div style={{background:COLORS.surface,border:`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,
        borderRadius:24,padding:"48px 40px",width:"100%",maxWidth:440}}>
        <div style={{textAlign:"center",marginBottom:32}}>
          <img src={LOGO_IMG} alt="SAT PrepPros" style={{width:52,height:52,objectFit:"contain",marginBottom:16}} />
          <div style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:800,fontSize:"1.6rem",color:COLORS.text,marginBottom:8}}>
            {isSignup?"Create your account":"Welcome back"}
          </div>
          <p style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:14}}>
            {isSignup?"Start your Digital SAT prep — free forever":"Sign in to continue your prep"}
          </p>
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:14}}>
          {isSignup&&<input type="text" placeholder="Full name" style={inputStyle}
            onFocus={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=COLORS.accent}
            onBlur={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=COLORS.border} />}
          <input type="email" placeholder="Email address" style={inputStyle}
            onFocus={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=COLORS.accent}
            onBlur={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=COLORS.border} />
          <input type="password" placeholder="Password" style={inputStyle}
            onFocus={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=COLORS.accent}
            onBlur={e=>e.target.style.borderColor=COLORS.border} />
          <button style={{
            background:`linear-gradient(135deg,${COLORS.blue},${COLORS.accent})`,
            border:"none",color:"#fff",fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontWeight:600,fontSize:15,
            padding:"13px",borderRadius:10,cursor:"pointer",marginTop:8,
          }}>{isSignup?"Create Account":"Sign In"}</button>
        </div>
        <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:12,margin:"24px 0"}}>
          <div style={{flex:1,height:1,background:COLORS.border}} />
          <span style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontSize:13,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif"}}>or</span>
          <div style={{flex:1,height:1,background:COLORS.border}} />
        </div>
        <button style={{width:"100%",background:"none",border:`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,
          color:COLORS.text,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:14,fontWeight:500,
          padding:"12px",borderRadius:10,cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",gap:10,
        }}>🔵 Continue with Google</button>
        <p style={{textAlign:"center",color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:13,marginTop:24}}>
          {isSignup?"Already have an account? ":"Don't have an account? "}
          <span style={{color:COLORS.accent,cursor:"pointer"}} onClick={()=>setPage(isSignup?"signin":"signup")}>
            {isSignup?"Sign In":"Sign Up Free"}
          </span>
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function Footer({ setPage }) {
  const links = {
    Product:["Practice Tests","Score Calculator","Analytics","AI Study Plans"],
    Resources:["Practice Questions","SAT Strategy Guide","FAQ","Updates"],
    Company:["About","Contact","Privacy Policy","Terms"],
  };
  return (
    <footer style={{borderTop:`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,padding:"60px 2rem 32px",maxWidth:1100,margin:"0 auto"}}>
      <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr",gap:40,marginBottom:48}}>
        <div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10,marginBottom:16}}>
            <img src={LOGO_IMG} alt="SAT PrepPros Logo" style={{width:36,height:36,objectFit:"contain"}} />
            <span style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:700,color:COLORS.text,fontSize:16}}>SAT PrepPros</span>
          </div>
          <p style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:14,lineHeight:1.6,maxWidth:260}}>
            AI-powered Digital SAT preparation. Free to start, built to score higher.
          </p>
          <a href="https://t.me/satpreppros" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style={{
            display:"inline-flex",alignItems:"center",gap:6,marginTop:16,
            color:COLORS.accent,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:13,fontWeight:600,textDecoration:"none",
          }}>📱 @satpreppros on Telegram</a>
        </div>
        {Object.entries(links).map(([cat,items])=>(
          <div key={cat}>
            <div style={{fontFamily:"Syne, sans-serif",fontWeight:600,color:COLORS.text,fontSize:14,marginBottom:16}}>{cat}</div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:10}}>
              {items.map(item=>(
                <span key={item} style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:14,cursor:"pointer",transition:"color 0.2s"}}
                  onMouseEnter={e=>e.target.style.color=COLORS.text}
                  onMouseLeave={e=>e.target.style.color=COLORS.textMuted}
                  onClick={()=>item==="Practice Questions"&&setPage("questions")}
                >{item}</span>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
      <div style={{borderTop:`1px solid ${COLORS.border}`,paddingTop:24,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:12}}>
        <span style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:13}}>© 2026 SAT PrepPros. All rights reserved.</span>
        <span style={{color:COLORS.textMuted,fontFamily:"DM Sans, sans-serif",fontSize:13}}>Not affiliated with College Board®</span>
      </div>
    </footer>
  );
}

export default function App() {
  const [page, setPage] = useState("home");
  const renderPage = () => {
    if (page==="home") return <HomePage setPage={setPage} />;
    if (page==="practice-tests") return <PracticeTestsPage setPage={setPage} />;
    if (page==="score-calculator") return <ScoreCalculatorPage />;
    if (page==="analytics") return <AnalyticsPage setPage={setPage} />;
    if (page==="pricing") return <PricingPage setPage={setPage} />;
    if (page==="questions") return <TelegramQuestionsPage />;
    if (page==="signin") return <AuthPage mode="signin" setPage={setPage} />;
    if (page==="signup") return <AuthPage mode="signup" setPage={setPage} />;
    return <HomePage setPage={setPage} />;
  };
  const showFooter = !["signin","signup"].includes(page);
  return (
    <>
      <style>{FONTS}</style>
      <div style={{background:COLORS.navy,minHeight:"100vh",color:COLORS.text}}>
        <Nav page={page} setPage={setPage} />
        {renderPage()}
        {showFooter && (
          <div style={{maxWidth:1100,margin:"0 auto",padding:"0 2rem"}}>
            <Footer setPage={setPage} />
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </>
  );
}
